title: Node Test Runner, Runtime Faults, Compile Rejections, Async Leaks, and CLI Tests · Contract Lens: Pokedex Ts Runtime Changed Fixtures
summary: Tests cast fixtures, mock global fetch across files, assert only snapshots, omit compile-negative cases, leave timers and listeners active, and never execute emitted JavaScript. Predict the user decision, runtime value, strict type claim, promise state, API boundary, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source.
